text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I'm watching some Umamusume<n>train, when...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ Blue skies, a nice breeze...<n>It's going to
be a great day! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I could run forever!<n>Wherever the wind
takes me. ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Really now? I was wondering who<n>was making
all that noise, but to think<n>it was you, Fine.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ah! Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We're supposed to be training.<n>Where do you
think you're going?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe. ♪ Well, if you're curious...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I just found a bunch of clovers<n>growing by the
track over there!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...And?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
They look so nice! I feel like my runs<n>have just
become three times as fun!<n>♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, right! You like flowers, right,<n>Groove?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Why don't you come with me? We<n>can look for
four-leaf clovers together!<n>♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh. Just focus on yourtraining!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You know the kinds of speeds we<n>can get up to.
You'll hurt yourself if<n>you don't watch the track!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh... So you were acting so stern out<n>of concern.
That's so sweet of you,<n>Groove! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...No. I'm telling you to stop goofing<n>around and
focus!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Huh? But it'd be a shame to not have<n>fun,
training or not!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Don't you agree? I'm talking to you<n>over there!
choice_data_list: Running with a friend is even more fun.
It's important to train and have fun!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're right! Groove, mind taking<n>a run with
me? ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'll show you where the clovers are<n>and race
you while we're at it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Only if you take it seriously. If you're<n>not one
hundred percent in it, you'll<n>lose.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'll do anything as long as it's<n>fun! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Aww... You sound just like Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It's not "just like" me, it's exactly<n>what I said. If
you don't take training<n>seriously, you'll never
win.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Let me see if you have enough guts<n>to pass me!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: To pass you? You mean...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ah, okay! You want to play tag!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You can be "it" first, so try and catch<n>me! Here I
go! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: No, I just meant races in general...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Well, whatever. As long as you're<n>going to run
with everything you've<n>got, I'll play along.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! I want to make each training<n>session
one to remember!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Why don't I grab my<n>camera? I bet I
could take some really<n>dynamic shots!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'll go get set up on the sidelines. ♪<n>I'll see you
around, Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Wait, Fine! ...I can never keep up with<n>her.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove looks completely<n>exasperated as she
leaves the track,<n>but she stays with Fine Motion
for a<n>while as she photographs other<n>trainees.
